title: King Riku Sees Kyros's Heart
description: Pages 6–10 focus on king riku sees kyros's heart, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows King Riku, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kyros's life as Dressrosa's legendary fighter and his bond with King Riku, Scarlet, and Rebecca reveal the human heart behind the toy soldier.

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: As far as the people are cancer- Ned, Princess scarlet is dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, Father!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It pains me to reward your trust with further hardship, your majesty...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I should think so!! This is quite unforgiv- able!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Or it would be, from any man but you!! Ah, kyros... this is quite the story. I have never heard the like!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Her name is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Rebecca.

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Come and hold her, kyros. This is your daughter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I could never touch something so pure and innocent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My hands are tainted hands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I cannot dirty this infant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh dear, oh dear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Isn't your daddy a silly man, Rebecca?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's like a little angel....!! Rebecca...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I will always watch over you... always be by your side....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Say hello to your grand- daddy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Rebec- CA! You've grown even bigger than last time I saw you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Father, take off the Ninja Mask...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Gloves..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Gloves ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Aren't you so cute........

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: So, so cute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Oh, look at you, crying again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: What in the world has happened to the king?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The Palace... is burning...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What is happening in this country...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I will go to the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Listen carefully, scarlet, Rebecca!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Father ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: If the danger reaches this far...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You must wait for me in the red flower field!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I will meet you there, I promise!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: PANT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What have you done to this country?! to his majesty?! Flthy Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: You saw for yourself, didn't you? The King set the towns alright himself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: His majesty would never do such a thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Release me from these Kairouseki chains!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I am no fruit user!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: I have heard a lot about you... I want you to serve under me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: This land will have a new king... and the old royal family will all perish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: have already sent my men after all those of Royal Blood...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: See for yourself!! The age of DressroSA under the House of Riku is over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Including your wife and daughter....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: This man...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: He sliced off his own leg!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Kyros!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: A toy....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: PANT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: My body has become a toy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What is this...?! Am I Dreaming?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: that toy just ran off with the king!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: It's me, your majesty!! kyros!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... I can't say I have ever heard that name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: But I will not forget the debt I owe you... mysterious toy!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Run for your lives!! Scarlet... Rebecca....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Wait for me in the place we promised!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Nobody remembers... my name...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Night is falling...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: PANT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: I must reach the red flower field...

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Scarlet and Rebecca... are waiting...

summary: King Riku Sees Kyros's Heart develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through King Riku, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
